mapper.sql: id, ip_address, ip_location, current_expire_time, total_ban_count, first_ban_time, last_ban_time, create_time, update_time, status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_ip_blacklist ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_ip_blacklist WHERE status = 1 AND (current_expire_time IS NULL OR current_expire_time > NOW()) ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_ip_blacklist WHERE status = 1 AND current_expire_time IS NOT NULL AND current_expire_time <= NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_ip_blacklist SET ip_location = #{ipLocation}, current_expire_time = #{currentExpireTime}, total_ban_count = #{totalBanCount}, last_ban_time = #{lastBanTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_ip_blacklist WHERE status = 1 AND (current_expire_time IS NULL OR current_expire_time > NOW())
